title: the most POWERFUL claude code feature in months
summary: Graphify is a non-RAG approach for processing large codebases and storing information through knowledge graph generation. It enables more accurate, token-efficient responses for code analysis without traditional retrieval-augmented generation.
writeup: The video covers Graphify, a Claude Code feature that builds knowledge graphs from codebases instead of relying on RAG. The motivation is memory constraints that surface when analyzing large codebases: Graphify generates structured representations from code analysis to work around them. The concrete takeaways are reduced token overhead and improved response accuracy, achieved by replacing retrieval-augmented generation with graph-based structure.
